overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night with a flashlight. The scene features a dirt path flanked by trees and stone formations, with a notable blood stain on the ground midway through. The footage appears to be from a video game, likely a horror or exploration genre, with realistic lighting and atmospheric environmental details.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a narrow dirt trail at night. A tall stone wall runs along the right side while trees line the left. The flashlight illuminates the immediate path ahead, revealing rocky terrain and dense darkness beyond the light's reach.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with blood stain and dense vegetation

events.description: dark red blood stain appears on the dirt path ahead
stone wall recedes into darkness as dense bushes and vegetation take over the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail, approaching and passing the blood stain on the ground

entered.detail: dark red blood splatter on the dirt path surface
thick bushes and undergrowth replacing the stone wall on the right

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, a disturbing blood stain appears on the path ahead. The stone wall that previously lined the right side gives way to dense vegetation and bushes. The flashlight beam passes over the blood stain as the walker continues deeper into the increasingly overgrown forest trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper forest trail with rock outcrop

events.description: large rock formation emerges on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest, flashlight revealing a large rock formation ahead on the right

entered.detail: large boulder or rock outcrop protruding near the path edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the dense forest as a large rock formation becomes visible on the right. Having passed the blood stain, the path winds deeper into the woods with thick vegetation on both sides. The flashlight continues to cut through the darkness, revealing the uneven trail ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark forest trail that shifts from a structured path beside a stone wall into an overgrown, wild woodland. It begins by moving along a narrow dirt trail where a tall stone wall lines the right and trees flank the left, with a flashlight cutting through the dense night. As the camera advances, the stone wall gives way to thick vegetation and bushes, and the beam of light reveals a disturbing blood stain on the ground. The scene then pushes deeper into the increasingly overgrown forest, passing the stain before the path winds toward a large rock formation on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward through the darkness, navigating an uneven trail hemmed in by thick vegetation on both sides.
